news.t: Pete Hegseth's broker attempted to make defense investments before Iran war: Financial Times
BlackRock Introduces Actively-Managed Defense ETF Focused on Global Security and Resilience

holdings.infoBox: IDEF is an equity ETF with a total of 127 individual holdings. The top holdings are RTX Corporation stock at 7.84%, Lockheed Martin at 6.91%, General Dynamics at 5.84%, The Boeing Company at 5.10%, and Northrop Grumman at 4.95%.

overview.description: The iShares Defense Industrials Active ETF (IDEF) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in industrials equity. The fund is actively managed, investing primarily in global defense and related industrials, such as aerospace and engineering, focusing on companies poised to benefit from increased defense spending. The fund aims to maximize total return. IDEF was launched on May 19, 2025 and is issued by BlackRock.

data.title: Pete Hegseth's broker attempted to make defense investments before Iran war: Financial Times
data.text: Hegseth's broker at banking giant Morgan Stanley contacted BlackRock in February about making a multimillion-dollar investment in its iShares Defense Industrials Active ETF. However, the investment di...
